summary: Mobile narrow admin customers page successfully renders the required success state with proper table data, controls, and actions. The screen shows appropriate customer management interface with search, filters, and customer rows containing truthful data fields. However, the interface uses generic neutral UI styling instead of the brand palette specified in the manifesto.

violations.description: Admin interface uses generic gray/neutral UI styling instead of the diner brand palette (teal backgrounds, cream surfaces, etc.) specified for public and authenticated surfaces

actions: Consider applying brand palette consistency between public marketing surfaces and authenticated admin interfaces
Verify that mobile narrow table scrolling maintains usability for all customer data columns and quick actions
